title: Pagination
description: Navigate paged content. Prefer semantic <nav> with links/buttons and clear current state.

props.name: siblingCount
props.description: How many pages to show adjacent to current page.

states.name: focus-visible
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

keyboard: Controls must be reachable via Tab; activation via Enter/Space on buttons, Enter on links.
aria: Use aria-labels on prev/next buttons (e.g. "Go to next page").

must: Current page must be clearly indicated (visual + aria-current).
Prev/next must be disabled correctly at boundaries.
should: Support compact mode with ellipsis for large page counts.
must_not: Do not render dozens of page links; use ellipsis/compaction.

token_usage.notes: Use default border for pagination items.
Use control radius for page pills/buttons.

examples.title: Semantic HTML reference
examples.html: 12
